title: Section 58
content: If the High Court 1*** is not satisfied that the statements contained in the case are sufficient to enable it to determine the questions raised thereby, the Court may refer the case back to the Revenue-authority by which it was stated, to make such additions thereto or alterations therein as the Court may direct in that behalf.
footnote: 1. The words Chief Court or Judicial Commissioners Court omitted by the A.O. 1948.
